items.title: Choosing problem type from target y
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  y["known label y"]
  cont["continuous numeric?"]
  disc["discrete category?"]
  reg["Regression: predict real value"]
  clf["Classification: predict class / P(class)"]
  y --> cont
  y --> disc
  cont -->|yes| reg
  disc -->|yes| clf
items.caption: Inspect the natural form of y first — number vs named category — before picking algorithms or metrics.

items.title: Shared supervised loop, different outputs
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  data["labeled (x, y)"]
  train["train model"]
  regout["regression: y_hat in R"]
  clfout["classification: class or proba"]
  data --> train
  train --> regout
  train --> clfout
items.caption: Both problem types use labeled pairs; they diverge at the output head, loss, and evaluation metrics.

items.title: Binary classification decision path
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  x["features x"]
  model["classifier"]
  prob["P(y=1|x)"]
  thresh["threshold e.g. 0.5"]
  label["predicted class"]
  x --> model --> prob --> thresh --> label
items.caption: Many classifiers output a probability first; a threshold converts it to a discrete label for deployment.
